allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\MiKTeX","C:\\texlive","C:\\Program Files\\MiKTeX","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\MiKTeX"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\" -Filter "pdflatex.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 3 FullName)
PowerShell(python -c "import pptx; print\('pptx ok', pptx.__version__\)" 2>&1; python --version 2>&1)
